query: SELECT awayTeam, homeTeam, awayML, homeML, mlAwayBetsPct, mlAwayMoneyPct, spreadAwayBetsPct, totalOverBetsPct FROM games WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' AND gameDate = '2026-03-08' AND awayML IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5;
